scripts.dev: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('node:fs'); const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const target = existsSync('dist/worker.js') ? 'dist/worker.js' : 'dist/src/worker.js'; const child = spawn(process.execPath, [target], { stdio: 'inherit' }); child.on('exit', code => process.exit(code ?? 0));"
